tasks.text_content:
Agent dashboard for leads:

- Lead detail view
- Mark as contacted/qualified
- Add notes
- Export to CSV

tasks.name: Core Web Vitals Optimization
tasks.text_content:
Performance improvements:
- Image optimization (WebP, lazy loading)
- Proper sizing (srcset)
- Font optimization
- Critical CSS inlining
- JS bundle splitting
- CDN configuration
- LCP < 2.5s, FID < 100ms, CLS < 0.1

tasks.name: List My Property Request Form
tasks.text_content:
NEW SELLER FLOW - Property owners can request to list on this agent website:

Form fields:
- Owner name
- Phone number
- Email
- Property address
- Property type (apartment/villa/plot)
- Approximate price expectation
- Property photos (optional upload)
- Preferred contact time
- Additional notes

Backend:
- Creates seller_lead with type = listing_request
- Routes separately from buyer inquiries
- Auto-reply email/WhatsApp to owner
- Notification to agent
tasks.description:

- Routes separately from buyer inquiries
- Auto-reply email/WhatsApp to owner
- Notification to agent

- Area in sq ft range
- Listing type (sale/rent)

tasks.text_content:
Frontend component:

- Uses tel: link protocol
- Call tracking number support (if configured)
- Logs call requests with property reference and source
- Shown prominently alongside WhatsApp button

tasks.name: WhatsApp Business API Integration
tasks.text_content:
Frontend component for WhatsApp Business API mode:
- Opens WhatsApp chat widget within the site
- Uses WhatsApp Web SDK
- Shows online/offline status
- Quick reply buttons
- Works when agent has WhatsApp Business API configured

tasks.name: WhatsApp Direct Button
tasks.text_content:
Frontend component that:
- Checks WhatsApp config mode (direct vs API)
- If Direct: Opens wa.me link with pre-filled message
- Message includes property reference, property title, and enquiry source
- Shown on property detail page and inquiry forms
- Floating WhatsApp button option for mobile

tasks.name: WhatsApp Configuration (CMS)
tasks.text_content:
Backend settings for WhatsApp with two modes:

Mode 1: Direct Link (default)
- WhatsApp number field
- Pre-filled message template

Mode 2: WhatsApp Business API
- API credentials fields
- Business account ID
- Web widget script embed

UI in admin panel for agent to toggle between modes.

- Web widget script embed

UI in admin panel for agent to toggle between modes.

- Date
- Agent relationship (which agent)
- Approved/published status (draft/published)
